en.title: Culinary Arts
en.desc: From mise en place to plated masterpiece. Students develop culinary technique, food science knowledge, and kitchen management skills in our professional lab kitchen — with industry mentorship and ServSafe certification.

postsec.name: CIA / Johnson & Wales / Auguste Escoffier
postsec.note: Highly respected culinary degrees with intense hands-on training; strong industry networks and alumni placement programs.

postsec.name: AAS in Culinary Arts
postsec.note: More affordable 2-year programs at regional community colleges with professional kitchen labs and local industry partnerships.

postsec.name: ServSafe Manager Certification
postsec.note: Required for food service management roles in most states; can be earned during this sequence.

postsec.name: ACF Certification (CC, CPC, CEC)
postsec.note: American Culinary Federation certifications from Certified Cook through Executive Chef — the professional ladder for culinary careers.

careers.title: Chef / Head Cook
careers.desc: Direct kitchen operations, develop menus, and lead culinary teams in restaurants, hotels, or catering operations.

careers.title: Food Service Manager
careers.desc: Oversee daily operations of restaurants, cafeterias, hotels, or institutional food service programs.

careers.title: Pastry Chef / Baker
careers.desc: Specialize in breads, pastries, desserts, and confections for restaurants, hotels, bakeries, or private clients.

careers.title: Private / Personal Chef
careers.desc: Prepare customized meals for private households, corporate executives, yachts, or exclusive venues.

financial.name: James Beard Foundation Scholarship
financial.note: One of the most prestigious culinary scholarships in the US — awarded to students enrolled in accredited culinary programs.

financial.name: ACF Scholarship Program
financial.note: The American Culinary Federation awards scholarships annually to student members pursuing culinary education and credentials.

financial.name: Federal Pell Grant
financial.note: Up to $7,395/year for eligible students. Apply via FAFSA at studentaid.gov.

financial.name: National Restaurant Association Educational Foundation
financial.note: The NRAEF and WIOA provide workforce training funding specifically for students entering foodservice careers.

es.title: Artes Culinarias
es.desc: De la mise en place a la obra maestra en el plato. Los estudiantes desarrollan técnica culinaria, conocimiento de ciencias de los alimentos y habilidades de gestión de cocina.
courses: Arte de la Panadería y Pastelería

postsec.name: CIA / Johnson & Wales / Auguste Escoffier
postsec.note: Títulos culinarios muy respetados con capacitación práctica intensa y sólidas redes en la industria.

postsec.name: AAS en Artes Culinarias
postsec.note: Programas de 2 años más asequibles con laboratorios de cocina profesional y asociaciones con la industria local.

postsec.name: Certificación ServSafe Manager
postsec.note: Requerida para roles de gestión en servicios de alimentos en la mayoría de los estados.

postsec.name: Certificación ACF (CC, CPC, CEC)
postsec.note: Certificaciones de la Federación Culinaria Americana desde Cocinero Certificado hasta Chef Ejecutivo.

careers.title: Chef / Cocinero/a Principal
careers.desc: Dirige operaciones de cocina, desarrolla menús y lidera equipos culinarios en restaurantes, hoteles o catering.

careers.title: Gerente de Servicios de Alimentos
careers.desc: Supervisa las operaciones diarias de restaurantes, cafeterías, hoteles o programas institucionales de alimentos.

careers.title: Chef de Pastelería / Panadero/a
careers.desc: Se especializa en panes, pasteles, postres y confitería para restaurantes, hoteles o clientes privados.

careers.title: Chef Privado/a
careers.desc: Prepara comidas personalizadas para hogares privados, ejecutivos corporativos, yates o lugares exclusivos.

financial.name: Beca de la Fundación James Beard
financial.note: Una de las becas culinarias más prestigiosas en EE. UU.

financial.name: Programa de Becas ACF
financial.note: La Federación Culinaria Americana otorga becas anualmente a estudiantes que buscan educación y credenciales culinarias.

financial.name: Beca Federal Pell
financial.note: Hasta $7,395/año para estudiantes elegibles. Solicitar vía FAFSA en studentaid.gov.

financial.name: Fundación Educativa NRAEF
financial.note: La NRAEF y WIOA proporcionan financiamiento de capacitación para estudiantes que ingresan a carreras en servicios de alimentos.
